title: CFO heartbeat
summary: First CFO heartbeat — created unit economics analysis showing ~$223 effective CAC per paying user and ~45 month payback. Recommended hold on paid spend. Fixed job routing. Added financial commentary to KPIs.
contextSummary: Unit economics are structurally broken for paid acquisition. Content-led organic growth is existential. Pricing and burn rate are undocumented gaps. RT-4 investigation started by CTO is the most important financial unblock. P1-P4 sequence is financially correct.
